mapper.select: SELECT id, store_name AS "storeName", email, phone, kyc_status AS "kycStatus", active, created_time AS "createdAt" FROM sellers AND LOWER(store_name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%',#{storeName},'%'))AND kyc_status = #{kycStatus}AND active = #{active} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sellers AND kyc_status = #{kycStatus}AND active = #{active}
SELECT seller_id AS "sellerId", order_count AS "orderCount", return_rate AS "returnRate", avg_rating AS "rating" FROM seller_performance AND seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY avg_rating DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seller_performance AND seller_id = #{sellerId}
